label: Marketing / Brand / Digital

categories.label: Quantified Campaign Impact
categories.rubric: Score 0-40 on % of bullets with marketing metrics (engagement rate, impressions, CTR, conversion, follower growth, CAC, ROAS, open rate). Marketing values campaign outcomes not duties. 'Helped with social media' = 0; 'Grew IG account from 200 to 4,800 followers (+2,300%) in 14 weeks' = strong.

categories.label: Marketing Domain Fit
categories.rubric: Score 0-25 on marketing/brand/digital relevance. Strong: internship at P&G/Unilever/L'Oreal/HubSpot/Ogilvy, campus marketing org officer, student-run publication, content portfolio. Weak: roles with no marketing framing even if adjacent.

categories.label: Marketing Tools & Analytics
categories.rubric: Score 0-15 on depth in 2-4 tools (not breadth in 15). Strong: GA4 + Google Ads + HubSpot + Hootsuite with hands-on projects. Listing every tool without depth is a red flag. Bonus: SEO tools (SEMrush/Ahrefs), A/B testing, Canva/Figma basics.

categories.label: Format / Portfolio
categories.rubric: Score 0-10 on 1-page rule, clean typography (typography matters in marketing), link to portfolio or content samples prominently placed. No tables/columns. .docx + .pdf + portfolio link tested.

categories.label: Personal Brand Consistency
categories.rubric: Score 0-10 on LinkedIn headline + content matching resume. Bonus if LinkedIn features original posts, articles, or portfolio work. Marketing hires personal-brand practitioners — show, don't claim.

categories.label: Extras, Side Projects & Certifications
categories.rubric: Score 0-10 on HubSpot Inbound/Content cert, Google Analytics GAIQ, Meta Blueprint, Hootsuite Social Marketing cert, side newsletter or Substack, TikTok/IG with measurable following, freelance UGC, side Etsy shop, hackathon wins, side-project section on resume.

bonus_signals: Portfolio site with writing samples + campaign case studies
Internship at known brand or agency (P&G, Unilever, L'Oreal, HubSpot, Ogilvy)
Personal brand on TikTok/IG/LinkedIn/Substack with measurable following
Case studies with metrics (engagement, impressions, CTR, conversion, follower growth)
HubSpot Inbound or Content Marketing certification
Meta Blueprint or Google Ads certification
Side newsletter / Substack / TikTok creator account
Volunteer marketing for nonprofits with documented impact
Hackathon wins or pitch competition wins
Multilingual skills for global brand roles
